name: Bizarro ninjas (ninjago)
description:
"Oh is it NSFW? 😊" WHAT ELSE WOULD YOU DO WITH THEM, HAVE A TEA PARTY?

On another note, these silly guys were inspired by an artists recreation of the Bizarro Ninjas, from the artist @ZayrenVie on Twitter/X.com

CHECK THEM OUT, THEY ARE COOL.

Anyways, the way that I type with them is just, not in the ".

They SHOULDN'T, talk as you, I never wrote them to be like that, and I 💯 percent understand the rage of that happening. But it is out of my control.

HERES SOME THINGS TO REMEMBER, I wrote them to be assholes, not soy boys, not little whiny men, no, they are mean, brutal, and they probably can't take no as an answer unless you emotionally manipulate them, but moving on.

Idk what else to say so imma put in some random photo.


TOTALLY NOT SATIRICAL, TOTALLY NOT. 😂😂😂

Anyways, thank yall for the support, I guess? Yeah, anyways. I WOULD LOVE TO READ YALLS CHATS, IF YOU THINK THEY ARE FUNNY, PLS MAKE PUBLIC, (if it makes yall feel better, no sarcasm, on my alt account I made my over 3000 message chat I made, with a Zane bot, for those who know it, know it.)

But if yall dont want to I completely get it.

OH ANOTHER THING, sorry if this all sounds kinda dry or sarcastic, I have trouble with typing and reading and telling what tone it is, BUT ANYYYWAYYSS, this is getting long, so imma end it here. SEE YALL.

⚠️⚠️⚠️IMPORTANT UPDATE⚠️⚠️⚠️

I am making more bots, where it's either two of them, or one of them. I HAVE ONE OUT RIGHT NOW, ITS ZANE AND COLE, I am pretty proud of the bot, but i did make it at 3 am, anyways, if you guys could check that out if you're interested, that would be awesome.

ALSO, I'm going to be updating this bot when I'm done with the other ones.

Bye yall 🗣🔥💯
creator: HONKASLAYER
